    九分钟热度

    • vimrc

      Posted on March 11, 2026

      ~/.vimrc " 开启行号 set number " 启用状态栏 set laststatus=2 " 显示当前编辑状态 set showmode " Mode Settings let &t_SI.="\e[6 q\<Esc>]12;orange\x7" "SI = INSERT mode let &t_SR.="\e[4 q\<Esc>]12;orange\x7" "SR = REPLACE mode let &t_EI.="\e[2 q\<Esc>]12;orange\x7" "EI = NORMAL mode (ELSE) " Cursor settings: " 1 -> blinking block " 2 -> solid... [Read More]
      Tags:
      • Linux
      • vim

    • nvidia-smi笔记

      Posted on March 11, 2026

      GPU Util的理解 reference: Understanding NVIDIA GPU Performance: Utilization vs. Saturation (2023) 搞懂 NVIDIA GPU 性能指标 很容易弄混的一个概念： Utilization vs Saturation (是上面文章的翻译, 不易于理解, 还是直接看原文比较好) 作者从go-nvml项目的一个头文件中找到了关于gpu util的解释 Each sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second, depending on the product being queried. GPU utilization: This represents the percentage of time during... [Read More]

      ~/.gitconfig [credential] helper = store 一步到位的命令 echo "[credential] helper = store" >> ~/.gitconfig

    • DeepStream Plugin - Gst-nvurisrcbin

      Posted on June 18, 2024

      Gst-nvurisrcbin — DeepStream 6.3 Release documentation (nvidia.com) 这个插件是一个gst source bin, 基于gst自带的uridecodebin, 添加了一些额外的功能: file loop、rtsp reconnection、smart record 更多信息可见gst-inspect-1.0 nvurisrcbin显示的内容
      Tags:
      • NVIDIA
      • DeepStream
